platformPurchases.title: Platform purchases (provider settlement)
platformPurchases.subtitle: Purchase records issued by the platform to the service provider.
platformPurchases.emptySub: Settlement purchase orders appear here when issued by the platform.

purchaseClaims.title: Payout claims
purchaseClaims.subtitle: Select platform settlement purchase orders, then submit for review — status and admin notes are recorded.
purchaseClaims.subtitlePlatform: After your organization approves the claim, platform finance completes final approval for disbursement.
purchaseClaims.settlementPoHint: Choose one or more platform settlement POs to include in this claim.
purchaseClaims.emptySettlementList: No settlement POs yet. Only platform-to-provider purchases appear here.
purchaseClaims.suggestedAmountHint: Prefilled from selected outstanding balances; you may override.
purchaseClaims.toastSentBody: The claim was sent to management.

executionHub.delegationTitle: Execute on behalf of a provider (execution partner)
executionHub.delegationHint: Select the provider first, then search by work order or plate. Service lines from the active order appear when applicable — full execution continues on the work order page.
executionHub.catalogDelegationTitle: Catalog (services & products) on behalf of provider
executionHub.catalogDelegationHint: Adds and edits here apply to the execution partner selected under Operations execution. Change the provider there if needed.
executionHub.title: Operations execution
executionHub.subtitle: Search by work order, plate, or camera (barcode/QR/plate). When the order is active or wallets have balance, service lines appear so you can continue execution through approval.
executionHub.branchHint: Lookup is scoped to your current branch unless your role has cross-branch access.
executionHub.plateFormatHint: Letters are uppercased. Format: 3 letters and 3–4 digits (e.g. ABC + 1234).
executionHub.cameraRowHint: One camera: barcode/QR for work order or vehicle, or plate photo (OCR)
executionHub.canExecuteHint: You may proceed with services through approval, per your permissions.
executionHub.checkBalanceHint: Check work order status or balance before execution.
executionHub.servicesSub: Record or update lines from the full work order; workflow may require manager approval.
executionHub.noLines: No line items yet. Open the work order to add services and continue execution.
executionHub.odometerSub: Photograph the odometer; a number is suggested (verify before saving on the work order).
executionHub.validationNeedInput: Enter a work order or a full plate (3 letters + 3–4 digits).

camera.button: Camera: barcode/QR (WO or vehicle) or plate photo
camera.viewfinderHint: Point at WO/vehicle barcode or QR — or shutter for plate
camera.plateFromPhotoRetry: Could not read a plate from the photo — retry or enter the plate manually.
camera.plateFromImageError: Could not read plate from image.
camera.hintBarcode: Live barcode needs Chrome/Edge — use shutter or gallery for plate.
camera.hintOcr: For plate OCR: good light, steady shot, HTTPS preferred. If recognition fails, retry or enter the plate manually.
